rationale: Educ. Code §29.371 governs the comptroller's annual longitudinal reporting on an educational assistance program. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax appraised values, or Tax Code §11.13, so increasing the homestead exemption amount does not conflict with this reporting requirement.
quote: The comptroller, in collaboration with the agency and the certified educational assistance organizations, shall compile program data and produce an annual longitudinal report
_note: No direct or indirect conflict identified. The rule concerns program reporting obligations, not property tax or homestead exemption mechanics.
